User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Smart Labs platform.

dateJoined.description: Date the user joined the platform.

hasCompletedOnboarding.description: Indicates if the user has completed the initial onboarding flow.

role.description: The user's role on the platform.

achievements.description: List of badge IDs the user has earned.

targetExam.description: The user's target exam (e.g., IELTS, PTE).

targetScore.description: The user's target score for their exam.

aboutSelf.description: A short bio or note from the user about their goals.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents a course offered on the Smart Labs platform (e.g., IELTS, TOEFL).

price.description: Price of the course in LKR.

Batch.title: Batch
Batch.description: Represents a specific batch or class group for a course.

name.description: Name of the batch (e.g., Weekend Batch, April Intake).

StudyPlan.title: StudyPlan
StudyPlan.description: Represents a personalized study plan for a student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the study plan.

startDate.description: Start date of the study plan.

endDate.description: End date of the study plan.

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Represents a student's enrollment in a course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the enrollment record.

batchId.description: Reference to the specific Batch the user is enrolled in.

batchName.description: Denormalized name of the batch for easier display.

enrollmentStatus.description: The verification status of the enrollment, controlled by an admin.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Represents a payment transaction processed through the gateway.

id.description: Unique identifier for the payment (e.g., from Payhere).

Resource.title: Resource
Resource.description: Represents a downloadable or embedded resource for courses.

url.description: URL of the resource (for file-based resources like images, videos, PDFs).

resourceType.description: Type of resource (e.g., html, image, video, document).

BlogPost.title: BlogPost
BlogPost.description: Represents a blog post on the Smart Labs platform.

slug.description: URL-friendly slug for the blog post.

content.description: Content of the blog post in HTML format.

excerpt.description: A short summary of the blog post.

image.description: URL for the blog post's feature image.

authorId.description: Reference to User (assumed to be the author). (Relationship: User 1:N BlogPost)

category.description: The category of the blog post (e.g., IELTS, PTE).

publishDate.description: Date the blog post was published.

PracticeTest.title: PracticeTest
PracticeTest.description: Represents a practice test that users can take.

id.description: Unique identifier for the practice test.

questions.description: List of question id's associated with the practice test. (Relationship: Question N:N PracticeTest)

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents a question within a practice test.

correctAnswer.description: The correct answer to the question.

options.description: The multiple choice options available for the user to select.

UserTestResult.title: UserTestResult
UserTestResult.description: Stores the results of a user taking a practice test.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user's test result.

score.description: The user's score on the test.

submissionDate.description: Date the user submitted the test.

answers.description: List of question id's that correspond to the user's answers. (Relationship: Question N:N UserTestResult)

SupportThread.title: SupportThread
SupportThread.description: Represents a support chat thread between a user and support staff.

userId.description: The ID of the user who initiated the chat.

lastMessage.description: A snippet of the last message sent in the thread.

isReadByAdmin.description: Indicates if the last message has been read by an admin.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within a support chat thread.

text.description: The content of the chat message.

senderId.description: The ID of the user or admin who sent the message.

timestamp.description: The time the message was sent.

ForumPost.title: ForumPost
ForumPost.description: Represents a discussion thread within a course forum.

title.description: The title of the forum post.

content.description: The main content of the post.

authorId.description: The ID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

courseId.description: The course this post belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

ForumReply.title: ForumReply
ForumReply.description: Represents a reply to a forum post.

postId.description: The ID of the parent forum post.

authorId.description: The ID of the user who wrote the reply.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the reply was created.

CourseReview.title: CourseReview
CourseReview.description: Represents a student's review of a course.

Badge.title: Badge
Badge.description: Represents an achievement or badge that can be awarded to users.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Only the user can read/write their own profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Denormalized data for checking active course enrollments in security rules. Document ID is the course ID. Writable only by trusted backend processes.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user's unique ID.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The course ID.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the course.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the course.

params.name: batchId
params.description: The unique identifier of the batch.

definition.description: Stores all payment transactions. Read-only for admins.

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The unique payment ID from the gateway.

definition.description: Stores study plans for each user. Only the user can access their own study plans. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: studyPlanId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study plan.

definition.description: Stores enrollment information for each user. Only the user can access their own enrollment records. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: enrollmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the enrollment.

params.description: The unique identifier of the blog post.

definition.description: Stores practice tests for each course. Accessible to all users.

params.description: The unique identifier of the course.

params.name: practiceTestId
params.description: The unique identifier of the practice test.

definition.description: Stores questions for each practice test. Accessible to all users enrolled in a course.

params.name: courseId

params.name: practiceTestId
params.description: The unique identifier of the practice test.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the question.

definition.description: Stores test results for each user. Only the user can access their own test results. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: userTestResultId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user test result.

definition.description: Top-level collection for support chat threads. Document ID is the user's UID.

definition.description: Sub-collection for messages within a support thread.

definition.description: Stores forum posts for a specific course.

definition.description: Stores replies for a specific forum post.

definition.description: Stores reviews for a specific course.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure has been updated to support a batch system for courses. 

**New `Batch` Entity and Subcollection:**
* A `Batch` entity has been added to represent specific class groups with their own schedule and Zoom links.
* These are stored in a subcollection: `/courses/{courseId}/batches/{batchId}`. This creates a clear hierarchical relationship.

**Updated Enrollment Structure:**
* The `Enrollment` path has been changed to `/users/{userId}/enrollments/{enrollmentId}` to allow for multiple enrollments per user, even in the same course (e.g., retakes or different batches). The `enrollmentId` is a unique ID (e.g., the payment ID).
* The `Enrollment` entity now includes `batchId` and `batchName` to link an enrollment to a specific batch.

**Security Rule Denormalization:**
* To efficiently check if a user is enrolled in a course within security rules (e.g., for resource access), a new denormalized path has been added: `/users/{userId}/active_courses/{courseId}`.
* When an admin approves an enrollment, a backend process will create a document at this path. This allows the `isEnrolled(courseId)` security rule function to use a simple and performant `exists()` check, avoiding disallowed queries in rules.
* This `active_courses` collection is read-only for the user and writable only by the backend, ensuring data integrity.

This revised structure provides the flexibility to manage multiple batches per course while maintaining a secure and performant way to check enrollment status for access control.
